svg.text: profile: { adventure, fitness, pace, interests[], budget, dietary }
status: planning | confirmed | active | completed | cancelled
status: planned | active | completed | swapped | skipped
CREATE INDEX idx_attractions_location ON attractions USING GIST(location);
CREATE INDEX idx_trips_user ON trips(user_id, status);
CREATE INDEX idx_activities_day ON activity_instances(day_id, order_index);
CREATE INDEX idx_conditions_activity ON condition_records(activity_id, fetched_at DESC);
SELECT * FROM attractions WHERE ST_DWithin(location, ST_Point(lng,lat)::geography, radius_m);
SELECT *, ST_Distance(location, ref::geography) AS dist FROM attractions ORDER BY dist LIMIT 20;
All tables include created_at + updated_at timestamps | UUIDs everywhere | Soft deletes via is_active flag | Alembic for schema migrations
